title: Federation /fed/dashboard/* routes
description: GET /fed/dashboard/state (HMAC), POST /fed/dashboard/restore (HMAC), POST /fed/dashboard/summary (HMAC). mDNS TXT extended with caps=dashboard-v1. Discovery poll every 10s while dashboard open.

context.text: Implemented HMAC-protected /fed/dashboard/state, /fed/dashboard/restore, and /fed/dashboard/summary; /fed/info dashboard-v1 capability advertising; peer cache and dashboard-open polling; federated summary writes through SessionsDb.updateSummary; restore path uses terminal launcher injection. Proof: focused federation/dashboard Jest suites passed after merge and tsc/build passed.
